# Equivalence Class 2
## Gram matrix Q
(355//6)^(1//8)  -(1//3)^(1//6)  -(1//3)^(1//6)  -(1//3)^(1//6)  (1//3)^(1//6)  (1//3)^(1//6)

-(1//3)^(1//6)  0  (1//3)^(1//6)  (64//3)^(1//6)  -(1//3)^(1//6)  -(1//3)^(1//6)
(1//3)^(1//6)  0  0  -(1//3)^(1//6)  (355//6)^(1//8)  (1//3)^(1//6)
(1//3)^(1//6)  0  -(1//3)^(1//6)  -(1//3)^(1//6)  (1//3)^(1//6)  (64//3)^(1//6)

# Equivalence Class 3 is the same as EC 2
